programs.title: McDonald And Dodds
programs.desc: The detectives investigate when the body of a successful Bath businessman is found in a shallow grave in the shadow of Glastonbury Tor on the dawn of All Soul's Day. Their first suspect is local artist Hector Ingham, although McDonald can't help but be suspicious of the man who found the body. As increasingly cryptic clues come to light, one name keeps reoccurring in paper trails, credit card statement and on the lips of witnesses - that of Dodds himself.

programs.title: Air Crash Investigations
programs.desc: Ethiopian Airlines Flight 302 nosedives after takeoff from Addis Ababa, killing everyone on board. This is the second fatal accident involving the Boeing 737 MAX 8 in just five months. When investigators conclude the same piece of software caused the plane to pitch down repeatedly in both accidents, the entire MAX 8 fleet is grounded until a fix can be found.

programs.title: Bargain Hunt
programs.desc: Join Christina Trevanion for this edition of Bargain Hunt from Wales. Experts Philip Serrell and Kate Bliss guide their teams as they pick three items to take to auction in Cardiff. Christina has a music lesson in one of Pembrokeshire's finest stately homes, Picton Castle.

programs.title: Our Town
programs.desc: A look at various Australian destinations to see why people should visit, live, work, play and invest locally, both regionally and in metropolitan regions.

programs.title: Australia's Deadliest
programs.desc: A young woman is viciously mauled by a great white shark, while a man's holiday is cut short when he is bitten by a deadly brown snake and a young boy goes into anaphylactic shock from an ant bite.

programs.title: Harry's Practice
programs.desc: Join Dr Harry Cooper and Dr Katrina Warren for everything you need to know about animals.
